title: Bridge Essay: Explaining the influence of biophilic design on employee well-being.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ecology/Animism** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Ecology/Animism — biophilia, nature connectedness, environmental neuroscience, neurobiophilia.

**Explaining the influence of biophilic design on employee well-being.**. Sci Rep.. PMID: 39738781. DOI: 10.1038/s41598-024-83791-9. Biophilic workplace design has been proposed as an effective strategy to increase employee well-being in open-plan offices. To expand our understanding of why and for whom indoor nature exposure increases well-being, the aim of this study was to evaluate vigor as amediator and to examine whether nature relatedness is adirect antecedent of nature exposure or amoderator of the relationship between exposure to nature and vigor.
